pages.text: Today is Bruno the brown bear's birthday! He wakes up feeling excited and happy. The sun shines through the trees in the forest. Bruno bounces on his paws, ready to share the good news. He wants to tell all his friends about his special day. "Maybe they will celebrate with me!" thinks Bruno.

Bruno visits his friend, the small panda, first. Panda is carrying bamboo stalks and looks very busy. "Hello, Panda! It's my birthday today!" says Bruno with a big smile. "Oh, hello Bruno! I must go now, sorry!" Panda hurries away quickly. Bruno's smile fades a little bit. He feels confused but keeps walking through the forest.

Next, Bruno finds the sleepy polar bear by the cool stream. Polar Bear yawns and stretches his white paws. "Polar Bear, it's my birthday!" Bruno calls out cheerfully. "That's nice, Bruno. I have to go now!" Polar Bear shuffles away, yawning again. Bruno's ears droop just a little. Why is everyone so busy today?

Bruno pads along to see the honey-loving sun bear. Sun Bear is licking her paws near the old oak tree. "Sun Bear, guess what? It's my birthday!" Bruno says hopefully. "Oh my! I really must dash, Bruno!" Sun Bear scampers off quickly. Bruno's tail begins to droop lower now. His heart feels heavy and sad inside his chest.

Finally, Bruno finds the shy spectacled bear near the berry bushes. Spectacled Bear peeks out from behind the leaves nervously. "Hello, friend. Today is my birthday," Bruno says quietly now. "I... I have to go! Sorry, Bruno!" Spectacled Bear disappears into the forest. Bruno feels forgotten and very alone. His tail droops all the way down.

Bruno walks slowly home through the darkening forest. His paws feel heavy with each step he takes. The trees whisper softly in the gentle evening breeze. "Nobody remembered my birthday," Bruno thinks sadly to himself. He reaches his little door and pushes it open. What could be waiting inside for a forgotten bear?

"SURPRISE!" all his friends shout together loudly and joyfully! Lanterns glow softly all around the cozy room. A beautiful honey cake sits on the wooden table. A colorful banner says "Happy Birthday Bruno!" in bright letters. Panda, Polar Bear, Sun Bear, and Spectacled Bear are all smiling. "We were getting everything ready!" they explain with warm hugs.

Bruno's heart fills up with love and happiness again. His friends sing a soft birthday song together. They share sweet honey cake under the rising moon. Bruno yawns a big, happy yawn as the lanterns flicker. "Best birthday ever," he whispers sleepily to his dear friends. Everyone snuggles close together as the stars twinkle outside. Good night, Bruno.
